nasb.text: But the sons of Israel were fruitful and increased greatly, and multiplied, and became exceedingly mighty, so that the land was filled with them.

esv.text: But the people of Israel were fruitful and increased greatly; they multiplied and grew exceedingly strong, so that the land was filled with them.

cnv.text: 以色列人生養繁衍眾多，人數增加，極其強盛，遍滿了那地。

ccb.text: 以色列人生养众多，人口大增，很快就遍布埃及，成为一个强大的民族。
